prestazioni: Harley-Davidson Screamin' Eagle Stage 4 131ci (2147cc) V-twin engine kit (engine code: Revolution V-Rod VRSC, 60° liquid-cooled) with forged 4.000" bore Mahle pistons, Screamin' Eagle camshafts (259° intake/261° exhaust duration, 0.610" lift), and S&S Cycle CNC-ported cylinder heads for 180+ HP at the rear wheel
Brembo GT 380mm 6-piston front brake kit (OEM V13R uses 300mm rotors) with Ferodo DS3000 high-friction pads and Goodridge 6AN stainless steel brake lines for 40% increased clamping force

Öhlins TTX22M coilover suspension with 2-way adjustable compression/rebound damping, 50mm stroke, and custom valving for the V13R's 1,200 lb (544 kg) dry weight, paired with Eibach ERS 1400N/mm springs and spherical bearing top mounts
estetica: Rocket Bunny V13R-specific widebody kit (2.5" fender flares per side) with carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser, designed for the V13R's 68.5" (1740mm) width and 102" (2591mm) wheelbase

Dymag Assault carbon fiber wheels (17x9 front, 17x11 rear) with custom offset (-15mm front, +5mm rear) to clear the Screamin' Eagle big-bore cylinders, wrapped in Michelin Power Cup 2 tires (245/40R17 front, 315/35R17 rear)

Custom titanium exhaust system by Akrapović with dual 2.5" carbon-wrapped downpipes, 304 stainless steel mid-pipes, and titanium mufflers (4.5" outlets) for a 12 lb weight reduction over OEM, featuring a removable baffle system for track/cruise modes
